sections.paragraph:
Original: מעז מעז מעוּז מעוז

Transliteration: mâ‛ôz mâ‛ûz mâ‛ôz mâ‛ûz

Phonetic: maw-oze'

BDB Definition:

  1. place or means of safety, protection, refuge, stronghold
    1. place of safety, fastness, harbour, stronghold
    2. refuge (of God) (figuratively)
    3. human protection (figuratively)

Origin: from H5810

TWOT entry: 1578a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
